notes: TEMPLATE build for the GW38 finale. Strategy = own the >40% core and captain the most-owned premium with zero risk. Haaland is OUT, so the template armband collapses onto the next most-owned nailed premium: M.Salah, at home vs Crystal Palace, on penalties and Liverpool's primary goal threat — the safe, highest-EO captain. Vice = Bowen (penalty duties vs relegation-threatened Leeds, near-guaranteed minutes and a real haul floor). Core = Arsenal defensive block (Gabriel/Saliba/Timber behind Raya) plus Salah/Saka/B.Fernandes/Mbeumo through the spine and Watkins/Mateta/Bowen as the heavily-owned forward line. No differentials by design — this is a variance-minimising, follow-the-field side. xpts.json was all-zero (end-of-season data gap), so projection is reconstructed from form + xgi_per90 + fixture priors: Salah ~5.4 base (captain doubles ~10.8), Bowen ~5.0, Saka ~4.8, B.Fernandes ~4.6, Mbeumo ~4.5, Watkins ~4.6, Mateta ~4.6, plus the Arsenal CS-led defence. XI total ~76 xPts including captain.
